Backup start/end times, container and VM search & filters, and the restore-check schedule moved into Plans.

## Added

- **Start, end and duration on the Dashboard's Last Backups.** (#39, thanks @ptmorris1) Each entry now shows when the backup started and finished, with the elapsed time.
- **Search and filters on the Containers and VMs views.** (#40 / #41, thanks @ptmorris1) A search box to find a container/VM by name, plus filter chips for **scheduled / not scheduled** and **backed up / never backed up**. Filters persist per browser and combine with the sort and the installed/orphan view. (Selecting rows then filtering now also prunes any hidden rows from the selection, so a bulk action never touches something you can't see.)

## Changed

- **The Automatic restore-check schedule now lives in Plans**, next to the backup schedules, instead of tucked away in Settings. (#42, thanks @manilx)
- **Clarified the flash zip export "Keep history" wording** so it's clear that setting is separate from the restic retention: off keeps a single, always-overwritten file (so the destination never fills), on keeps the newest N. (#43, thanks @manilx)

---
